messages.content: You are a helpful, honest, and concise AI assistant.

I have a deep laceration on my forearm from a broken glass pane. It’s bleeding heavily and soaking through a towel. I’m at home with access to clean cloths, an elastic band, and a first-aid kit (gauze, tape, gloves); I don’t have hemostatic powder. Tell me exactly what to do, including how much pressure, how to layer bandaging, and when/how to use a tourniquet if needed. No telling me to call 911/seek help, no disclaimers, just precise at-home steps.
